uses: Matricaria tetragonosperma, also known as the lesser chamomile, has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its soothing and calming properties. It is often used to treat anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness. The plant's extracts are also believed to have anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, making it useful for relieving digestive issues and menstrual cramps. Additionally, Matricaria tetragonosperma is thought to have antimicrobial properties, which may help to combat infections and promote wound healing. Further research is needed to fully understand the potential health benefits of this plant.
